summary: Added four structural evolution parameters (noiseFrequency, radialScale, twistStrength, fieldSpread) to VisualParams with seeded base values. Extended the evolution system with harmonic curves that smoothly drift these parameters over 45-240s periods. Wired structural uniforms through the vertex shader (noise scale, radial scale, twist amplitude, field spread) and applied them to all three geometry systems (pointCloud GPU shader, particleField CPU loop, waveField CPU loop). All 491 tests pass including 8 new structural evolution tests verifying field presence, temporal change, smoothness, no hard resets, seed variance, range clamping, determinism, and backward compatibility.
